case_title: PACIFIC BUSINESS PRODUCTS INC VS THE FLAMER GROUP

docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED RECEIPT INVALID, SERVICE WAS DONE ON PLAINTIFF; NO DEFENDANT'S CLAIM ON FILE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-06-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-29-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
